title: cli: ConfirmationEvent type + mpsc channel + select! branch
description:
What: Define ConfirmationEvent struct and wire an mpsc channel from the background watcher to the chat() select! loop in cli/src/commands.rs.

Algorithm:
1. Define: pub struct ConfirmationEvent { pub session_id: Uuid, pub txid: String, pub block_height: u64 } near the top of commands.rs.
2. In chat() startup (before spawning watcher): let (conf_tx, mut conf_rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<ConfirmationEvent>(32);
3. Pass Arc::clone of conf_tx (or clone) to the watcher task when spawning it.
4. In the main select! loop, add branch: event = conf_rx.recv() => { if let Some(ev) = event { handle_confirmation(&ev, ...) } else { /* watcher exited */ } }
5. handle_confirmation: transition session state to Complete in wallet DB, call send_payment_message(ev.session_id, PaymentAction::Confirmed { tx_hash: ev.txid }, tx, mls_active, mls).await.

Defensive programming:
- Channel buffer 32 prevents watcher from blocking on slow UI.
- conf_rx.recv() returning None means watcher exited cleanly; do not panic, just log at debug level.
- txid in ConfirmationEvent must be 64 lowercase hex chars; assert in tests.
- Do NOT log session_id alongside any wallet key material.

Tests: compilation + integration (E2E bead); this bead is complete when cargo build --workspace passes and no new clippy warnings.

Acceptance: cargo build --workspace succeeds with no new warnings; ConfirmationEvent struct is pub and derives Debug.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build --workspace succeeds; ConfirmationEvent struct exists and is accessible from watcher task; no new clippy warnings
close_reason: ConfirmationEvent struct + mpsc channel + select! branch added to chat(); clippy clean; all 261 tests pass
